basic_details.job_title: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Technology Rourkela (NIT Rourkela) has published the Junior Research Fellow (PhD) Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Junior Research Fellow (PhD) positions under a project-based appointment. Candidates with B.Tech/ B.E or M.E/ M.Tech qualifications and an upper age limit of 30 years (age relaxation applicable as per rules) are eligible to apply through Email via the official NIT Rourkela website. The application process is open until 06-Jul-2026, while the walk-in/interview is scheduled for 09-Jul-2026. Candidates can access the offici

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Upper age limit 30 years (relaxed by 5 years for SC/ST/PWD/Female and 3 years for OBC)
age_limit.details: Upper age limit: 30 years. Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ ST/ PWD/Female candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.details: First class in Matriculation and +2. B.Tech /B.E in CSE/ IT/ AI/ DS/Atmospheric Science/Oceanography/Remote Sensing with minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% with valid GATE Score. M.E/ M.Tech in CSE/ IT/ AI/ DS/Atmospheric Science/Oceanography/Remote Sensing with minimum CGPA of 7.0 or 65% from a recognized Technical Institute/University. Desirable: Strong programming skills in Python or MATLAB. Prior hands-on experience or coursework in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Advanced Ensemble Learning techniques. Familiarity with handling high-dimensional environmental datasets, satellite remote sensing observations, and GIS tools (ArcGIS/ QGIS). Basic understanding of feature engineering methodologies like PCA, RFE, and Extra Trees Classifiers. Candidates with GATE qualification will be given priority.

salary_details.pay_scale: INR 37,000/- per month for Year 1 & 2, INR 42,000/- per month for Year 3
salary_details.details: Year 1 & 2: INR 37,000.00/- per month Year 3: INR 42,000.00/- per month

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and need of the project Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (PhD) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-Jul-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Rourkela Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: First class in Matriculation and +2. B.Tech /B.E in CSE/ IT/ AI/ DS/Atmospheric Science/Oceanography/Remote Sensing with minimum CGPA of 6.5 or 60% with valid GATE Score. M.E/ M.Tech in CSE/ IT/ AI/ DS/Atmospheric Science/Oceanography/Remote Sensing with minimum CGPA of 7.0 or 65% from a recognized Technical Institute/University. Desirable: Strong programming skills in Python or MATLAB. Prior hands-on experience or coursework in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Advanced Ensemble Learning techniques. Familiarity with handling high-dimensional environmental datasets, satellite remote sensing observations, and GIS tools (ArcGIS/ QGIS). Basic understanding of feature engineering methodologies like PCA, RFE, and Extra Trees Classifiers. Candidates with GATE qualification will be given priority.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow (PhD) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-Jul-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Rourkela Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow (PhD) position at NIT Rourkela?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application via email is 06-Jul-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow (PhD) post?
faq.answer: Candidates should have a First class in Matriculation and +2, along with a B.Tech/B.E or M.E/M.Tech degree in relevant fields with specified CGPA or percentage and a valid GATE score for B.Tech/B.E.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (PhD) position?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 30 years. Age relaxations are provided for SC/ST/PWD/Female (5 years) and OBC (3 years) candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (PhD) role?
faq.answer: The salary is INR 37,000/- per month for the first two years and INR 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow (PhD) position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to send their complete filled and signed application along with required documents as a single PDF file via email to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (PhD) post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is NITR/SR/2026/Advt.-26CS009 /L/046.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Rourkela located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Rourkela is located in Rourkela, Odisha, with the pincode 769008.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Junior Research Fellow (PhD) position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based research job.
